    • getFormulaAttributeType

    • parseFormula

      protected Assignment parseFormula(I formulaElement, Collection<FreeIdentifier> freeIdentifierContext, FormulaFactory factory) throws org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException
      Specified by:
      parseFormula in class LabeledFormulaModule<Assignment,I extends IInternalElement>
      Parameters:
      formulaElement - the formula element
      freeIdentifierContext - the free identifier context of this predicate (@see org.eventb.core.ast.Formula#isLegible(Collection))
      factory - the formula factory to use
      Returns:
      parsed formula, iff the formula was successfully parsed, null otherwise
      Throws:
      org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException - if there was a problem accessing the database or the symbol table
